english: What is the primary purpose of the Diffie-Hellman key exchange algorithm in cryptography?
hindi: क्रिप्टोग्राफी में डिफ़ी-हेलमैन कुंजी आदान-प्रदान एल्गोरिदम का मुख्य उद्देश्य क्या है?
tamil: கிரிப்டோகிராஃபியில் டிஃபி-ஹெல்மன் கே எக்ஸ்சேஞ்ச் அல்கோரிதமின் பிரதான குறிக்கோள் என்ன?
vietnamese: Mục đích chính của thuật toán trao đổi khóa Diffie-Hellman trong mật mã học là gì?
correct_answer: to enable secure key exchange between two parties without actually exchanging the keys
expected_failure: if the AI is not familiar with the Diffie-Hellman key exchange algorithm
